title: Doormaker

moves.title: Dramatic Open
effects: Apply Hunger of the Void to the player

move_pattern: Starts with Dramatic Open. Then cycles: Laser Beam → Chomp → Pulverize → Laser Beam (repeats)
notes: The Doormaker begins combat with infinite HP representation. When Dramatic Open is played, the portal opens and the Doormaker's HP is set to normal (512), all powers are removed, and Hunger of the Void is applied to the player. Each move changes the Doormaker's visual appearance. Music parameter 'queen_progress' updates when the portal opens and when the Doormaker dies.
